title: Make Your Bed
description: Pull up the sheets and blankets and arrange pillows neatly.

title: Clean Your Room
description: Pick up toys, clothes, and items off the floor. Put everything in its place.

title: Set the Table
description: Place plates, cups, napkins, and utensils for each family member before a meal.

title: Take Out the Trash
description: Remove full trash bags from indoor bins and carry them to the outdoor trash can.

title: Feed the Pets
description: Measure out the correct amount of food and fill the pet's bowl. Refresh water too.

title: Water the Plants
description: Use a watering can to give each indoor or outdoor plant the right amount of water.

title: Load the Dishwasher
description: Rinse dishes and place them in the dishwasher racks correctly.

title: Unload the Dishwasher
description: Put away clean dishes, cups, and utensils in their correct cabinets and drawers.

title: Fold Laundry
description: Neatly fold clean clothes and sort them into piles for each family member.

title: Sweep the Floor
description: Use a broom to sweep the kitchen or living room floor and collect dust into a dustpan.

title: Organize Toys
description: Sort toys into bins or shelves. Group similar items together.

title: Wipe Kitchen Counters
description: Use a damp cloth to wipe down all kitchen counters after meals.

title: Vacuum a Room
description: Vacuum the carpet or floor in one room, making sure to get corners and under furniture.

title: Sort Recycling
description: Separate recyclable items (paper, plastic, glass) into the correct bins.

title: Clean the Bathroom Sink
description: Wipe down the bathroom sink and counter with cleaning spray and a cloth.

title: Put Away Groceries
description: Help unpack grocery bags and put items in the pantry, fridge, or freezer.

title: Dust Furniture
description: Use a duster or cloth to remove dust from shelves, tables, and surfaces.

title: Mop the Floor
description: Mop the kitchen or bathroom floor with a damp mop and cleaning solution.

title: Clean Windows
description: Spray glass cleaner on windows and wipe them clean with a cloth or paper towel.

title: Mow the Lawn
description: Use a lawn mower to cut the grass in the yard with adult supervision.

title: Read for 20 Minutes
description: Read a book or age-appropriate material quietly for at least 20 minutes.

title: Practice Spelling Words
description: Practice this week's spelling list by writing each word three times.

title: Complete a Math Worksheet
description: Finish one page of math problems appropriate for your grade level.

title: Science Experiment
description: Do a simple science experiment with adult supervision and record your observations.

title: Learn a New Vocabulary Word
description: Look up a new word in the dictionary, learn its meaning, and use it in a sentence.

title: Write in Your Journal
description: Write at least half a page about your day, a story, or something you learned.

title: Learn the Alphabet (A-Z)
description: Learn to recognize and write all 26 letters of the alphabet. Complete one letter per step.

title: Practice Multiplication Tables
description: Work on memorizing multiplication tables from 1 through 12.

title: Do Homework
description: Complete all assigned homework neatly and on time.

title: Watch an Educational Video
description: Watch an approved educational video and tell a parent one thing you learned.

title: Practice Handwriting
description: Fill one page of handwriting practice with neat, careful letter formation.

title: Read 20 Books Challenge
description: Read 20 complete books over time. Log each book as a step when finished.

title: Learn About a Country
description: Research a new country: find it on a map, learn its capital, flag, and one fun fact.

title: Practice Typing
description: Spend 15 minutes practicing typing on an approved typing program.

title: Build a Book Report
description: Write a short report about a book you finished: title, author, summary, and your opinion.

title: Study for a Test
description: Spend at least 30 minutes reviewing notes and materials for an upcoming test.

title: Practice a Foreign Language
description: Spend 15 minutes on a language-learning app or practice vocabulary flashcards.

title: Write a Short Story
description: Write an original short story with a beginning, middle, and end (at least one page).

title: Complete a Puzzle
description: Finish an age-appropriate jigsaw puzzle or logic puzzle from start to end.

title: Learn to Count to 100
description: Practice counting from 1 to 100 out loud or by writing the numbers.

title: Brush Teeth Independently
description: Brush your teeth thoroughly for two full minutes, morning and night, without reminders.

title: Tie Your Shoes
description: Practice tying your shoes by yourself until you can do it without help.

title: Pack Your Lunch
description: Choose healthy items and pack your own lunch for school or an outing.

title: Set Your Alarm
description: Set your alarm clock for the correct wake-up time and get up on your own.

title: Make a Simple Breakfast
description: Prepare a simple breakfast like cereal, toast, or fruit on your own.

title: Basic Cooking Skill
description: Help prepare a meal component with adult supervision (stir, measure, chop soft foods).

title: Organize Your Backpack
description: Clean out old papers and organize school supplies in your backpack.

title: Get Dressed Independently
description: Pick out weather-appropriate clothes and get dressed without help.

title: Take a Shower Independently
description: Take a full shower on your own, including washing hair and body.

title: Do Your Own Laundry
description: Sort darks and lights, load the washing machine, add detergent, and start a cycle.

title: Learn to Tell Time
description: Practice reading analog and digital clocks to tell the correct time.

title: Make Your Own Snack
description: Prepare a healthy snack on your own (fruit, crackers and cheese, veggies and dip).

title: Learn to Use a Phone Safely
description: Practice making a call, sending a text, and knowing when it is appropriate to use a phone.

title: Manage Weekly Allowance
description: Track spending and saving of your weekly allowance for one full week.

title: Cook a Full Meal
description: Plan and cook a complete meal for the family with minimal adult help.

title: 7-Day Morning Routine Streak
description: Complete your full morning routine (brush teeth, get dressed, make bed, eat breakfast) every day for 7 days.

title: Learn Your Home Address
description: Memorize your full home address including street, city, state, and zip code.

title: Practice Good Table Manners
description: Use napkin, chew with mouth closed, say please and thank you during a full meal.

title: Iron Your Clothes
description: Learn to safely iron a shirt or pair of pants with adult supervision.

title: Plan a Weekly Schedule
description: Write out your activities and commitments for the upcoming week.

title: Practice Instrument for 20 Minutes
description: Practice your musical instrument for at least 20 focused minutes.

title: Draw or Paint a Picture
description: Spend time creating an original drawing or painting.

title: Build with Legos or Blocks
description: Build a creative structure using Legos, blocks, or other building toys.

title: Outdoor Play for 30 Minutes
description: Spend at least 30 minutes playing outside (running, biking, climbing, etc.).

title: Practice a Sport Skill
description: Spend 20 minutes practicing a specific sport skill (dribbling, throwing, kicking).

title: Learn a Dance Move
description: Learn and practice a new dance move or short routine.

title: Craft Project
description: Complete a craft project using supplies like paper, glue, scissors, or fabric.

title: Photography Walk
description: Take a walk and photograph 10 interesting things you see in your neighborhood.

title: Write a Song or Poem
description: Compose an original song or poem with at least two verses.

title: Garden for 20 Minutes
description: Spend time weeding, planting, or tending a garden bed or potted plants.

title: Learn a Card or Board Game
description: Learn the rules of a new card game or board game and play one round.

title: 30-Day Drawing Challenge
description: Complete one drawing each day for 30 days. Each day counts as one step.

title: Build a Model Kit
description: Assemble a model kit (airplane, car, ship) following the instructions.

title: Bake Something
description: Follow a recipe to bake cookies, muffins, or bread with adult supervision.

title: Practice Yoga or Stretching
description: Follow along with a kid-friendly yoga or stretching routine for 15 minutes.

title: Learn Origami
description: Follow instructions to fold a paper into an origami shape (crane, boat, frog, etc.).

title: Record a Video or Podcast
description: Plan and record a short video or audio podcast about a topic you enjoy.

title: Play a Board Game with Family
description: Play a full board or card game with family members. Practice good sportsmanship.

title: Try a New Recipe
description: Find and follow a new recipe you have never tried before, with help as needed.

title: Sew or Knit a Small Project
description: Work on a small sewing or knitting project like a pouch, scarf, or patch.

title: Learn 10 Instrument Songs
description: Learn to play 10 songs on your instrument. Log each song as a completed step.

title: Nature Scavenger Hunt
description: Go outdoors and find 10 items from a nature scavenger hunt list.
